programme.title: Возвращение Мухтара
programme.desc: Приключения сплоченной команды сотрудников милиции и служебного пса Мухтара продолжаются. Оперативники Максим Жаров и Алексей Самойлов, следователь Василиса Михайлова и их четвероногий друг сталкиваются с самыми разными преступлениями. Чаще всего главную роль в расследованиях играет именно мохнатый страж порядка. Работа у Мухтара непростая, и его главная задача — найти и обезвредить! Помимо того, что Муха — настоящий профессионал, он еще и верный помощник, настоящий друг, готовый всегда прийти на выручку. Он — душа команды. Именно благодаря его уникальным способностям — исключительному обонянию, "шестому чувству", моментальной реакции и преданности хозяину — команде детективов удается справляться с любыми делами — и рядовыми, и повышенной сложности!

programme.title: Возвращение Мухтара

programme.title: Склифосовский
programme.desc: Фильм о сложных, драматичных, подчас героических буднях врачей главного института скорой помощи – знаменитого "Склифа". Их работа – испытание на прочность, каждый день они дают кому-то вторую жизнь... В центре истории – непростые отношения хирурга Олега Брагина, блестящего врача, умного, жесткого и харизматичного, но давно отчаявшегося найти в жизни что-то настоящее, кроме работы, и начальницы Ларисы – сумевшей сквозь цинизм Брагина разглядеть потерянного в жизни и одинокого человека...

programme.title: Универ. Новая общага
programme.desc: Оставленным на второй год пятикурсникам Антону и Кузе привалило счастье. Их старая общага идет под снос, и в новом корпусе их селят в блок с тремя девушками - Кристиной, Машей и Яной. В роли аспиранта в универ возвращается и Майкл - чтобы откосить от армии. Ребята стали старше и... романтичнее. Теперь им хочется не только секса и тусовок, но и настоящих чувств. Однако вызвать взаимность у дам сердца не так просто, как кажется.

programme.title: Универ. Новая общага
programme.desc: Оставленным на второй год пятикурсникам Антону и Кузе привалило счастье. Их старая общага идет под снос, и в новом корпусе их селят в блок с тремя девушками - Кристиной, Машей и Яной. programme.title: Провинциал
programme.desc: В небольшом провинциальном городке Долининске убит директор завода Пётр Андреев. Его сын Сергей уверен: отца, горой стоявшего за народ и правду, за нормальную жизнь, никогда не бравшего взяток и противостоявшего коррупции, убили люди олигарха Груздева, мечтающего прибрать к рукам градообразующее предприятие. О трениях, возникших между Андреевым и Груздевым, было известно всем, ведь бизнесмен собирался оставить несколько тысяч людей без работы. Сын считает своим долгом отомстить за отца, но загвоздка в том, что Груздев живет в Санкт-Петербурге, его "не достать" – слишком уж высок уровень. Тем не менее Андреев-младший принимает решение идти до конца, чтобы зло вернулось к тем, кто его совершил.

programme.title: Провинциал
programme.desc: В небольшом провинциальном городке Долининске убит директор завода Пётр Андреев. Его сын Сергей уверен: отца, горой стоявшего за народ и правду, за нормальную жизнь, никогда не бравшего взяток и противостоявшего коррупции, убили люди олигарха Груздева, мечтающего прибрать к рукам градообразующее предприятие. О трениях, возникших между Андреевым и Груздевым, было известно всем, ведь бизнесмен собирался оставить несколько тысяч людей без работы. Сын считает своим долгом отомстить за отца, но загвоздка в том, что Груздев живет в Санкт-Петербурге, его "не достать" – слишком уж высок уровень. Тем не менее Андреев-младший принимает решение идти до конца, чтобы зло вернулось к тем, кто его совершил.

programme.title: Три цвета любви
programme.desc: Элеонора Павлинская - профессорская внучка, в совершенстве владеющая пятью языкам и посвятившая свою жизнь работе с детьми-аутистами. В жизни Эли есть только работа и любимая бабушка, которая вырастила девочку одна. Ее жизнь стабильна и предсказуема. Но однажды все меняется, когда ее приглашает в свой дом Константина Литвак в качестве репетитора для взрослой дочери.

programme.title: Склифосовский
programme.desc: Фильм о сложных, драматичных, подчас героических буднях врачей главного института скорой помощи – знаменитого "Склифа". Их работа – испытание на прочность, каждый день они дают кому-то вторую жизнь... В центре истории – непростые отношения хирурга Олега Брагина, блестящего врача, умного, жесткого и харизматичного, но давно отчаявшегося найти в жизни что-то настоящее, кроме работы, и начальницы Ларисы – сумевшей сквозь цинизм Брагина разглядеть потерянного в жизни и одинокого человека...

programme.title: Склифосовский
programme.desc: Фильм о сложных, драматичных, подчас героических буднях врачей главного института скорой помощи – знаменитого "Склифа". Их работа – испытание на прочность, каждый день они дают кому-то вторую жизнь... В центре истории – непростые отношения хирурга Олега Брагина, блестящего врача, умного, жесткого и харизматичного, но давно отчаявшегося найти в жизни что-то настоящее, кроме работы, и начальницы Ларисы – сумевшей сквозь цинизм Брагина разглядеть потерянного в жизни и одинокого человека...

programme.title: След
programme.desc: Федеральная экспертная служба занимается расследованием самых запутанных дел. К помощи экспертов обращаются различные государственные структуры, будь то полиция или следственный комитет. Служба имеет целый штат профессионалов своего дела – тут и криминалисты, и баллистики, и патологоанатомы, и программисты. Кроме того, каждый кабинет оборудован по последнему слову техники. Парк автомобилей представлен лучшими моделями отечественного и иностранного производства. На этот раз ребятам предстоит столкнуться с серийным убийцей. Он хитер, расчетлив, и каждый раз ему удается бежать от наказания. Однако за дело берутся лучшие специалисты в своем деле, и на этот раз ему не скрыться. Улики собраны, осталось только навестить преступника. проверенным товарищам, и скоро ему понадобится их помощь и поддержка…

programme.title: След
programme.desc: Федеральная экспертная служба занимается расследованием самых запутанных дел. К помощи экспертов обращаются различные государственные структуры, будь то полиция или следственный комитет. programme.title: Универ. Новая общага
programme.desc: Оставленным на второй год пятикурсникам Антону и Кузе привалило счастье. Их старая общага идет под снос, и в новом корпусе их селят в блок с тремя девушками - Кристиной, Машей и Яной. В роли аспиранта в универ возвращается и Майкл - чтобы откосить от армии. Ребята стали старше и... романтичнее. Теперь им хочется не только секса и тусовок, но и настоящих чувств. Однако вызвать взаимность у дам сердца не так просто, как кажется.

programme.title: Универ. Новая общага

programme.desc: Федеральная экспертная служба занимается расследованием самых запутанных дел. programme.title: Провинциал
programme.desc: В небольшом провинциальном городке Долининске убит директор завода Пётр Андреев. Его сын Сергей уверен: отца, горой стоявшего за народ и правду, за нормальную жизнь, никогда не бравшего взяток и противостоявшего коррупции, убили люди олигарха Груздева, мечтающего прибрать к рукам градообразующее предприятие. О трениях, возникших между Андреевым и Груздевым, было известно всем, ведь бизнесмен собирался оставить несколько тысяч людей без работы. Сын считает своим долгом отомстить за отца, но загвоздка в том, что Груздев живет в Санкт-Петербурге, его "не достать" – слишком уж высок уровень. Тем не менее Андреев-младший принимает решение идти до конца, чтобы зло вернулось к тем, кто его совершил.

programme.title: Треугольник судьбы
programme.desc: Начинающий юрист Тимур одержим идеей вывести на чистую воду мощную "квартирную мафию", которая лишила крова десятки семей. Тимур не подозревает, что путь, на который он встал, заставит его потерять семью, стать посмешищем и столкнуться с мучительным выбором.

Их работа – испытание на прочность, каждый день они дают кому-то вторую жизнь... В центре истории – непростые отношения хирурга Олега Брагина, блестящего врача, умного, жесткого и харизматичного, но давно отчаявшегося найти в жизни что-то настоящее, кроме работы, и начальницы Ларисы – сумевшей сквозь цинизм Брагина разглядеть потерянного в жизни и одинокого человека...

programme.title: Склифосовский
programme.desc: Фильм о сложных, драматичных, подчас героических буднях врачей главного института скорой помощи – знаменитого "Склифа". programme.title: След
programme.desc: Федеральная экспертная служба занимается расследованием самых запутанных дел. К помощи экспертов обращаются различные государственные структуры, будь то полиция или следственный комитет. Служба имеет целый штат профессионалов своего дела – тут и криминалисты, и баллистики, и патологоанатомы, и программисты. Кроме того, каждый кабинет оборудован по последнему слову техники. Парк автомобилей представлен лучшими моделями отечественного и иностранного производства. На этот раз ребятам предстоит столкнуться с серийным убийцей. Он хитер, расчетлив, и каждый раз ему удается бежать от наказания. Однако за дело берутся лучшие специалисты в своем деле, и на этот раз ему не скрыться. Улики собраны, осталось только навестить преступника. проверенным товарищам, и скоро ему понадобится их помощь и поддержка…

programme.title: Универ. Новая общага
programme.desc: Оставленным на второй год пятикурсникам Антону и Кузе привалило счастье. Их старая общага идет под снос, и в новом корпусе их селят в блок с тремя девушками - Кристиной, Машей и Яной. В роли аспиранта в универ возвращается и Майкл - чтобы откосить от армии. Ребята стали старше и... романтичнее. Теперь им хочется не только секса и тусовок, но и настоящих чувств. Однако вызвать взаимность у дам сердца не так просто, как кажется.

programme.title: Универ. Новая общага

programme.title: Провинциал
programme.desc: В небольшом провинциальном городке Долининске убит директор завода Пётр Андреев. Его сын Сергей уверен: отца, горой стоявшего за народ и правду, за нормальную жизнь, никогда не бравшего взяток и противостоявшего коррупции, убили люди олигарха Груздева, мечтающего прибрать к рукам градообразующее предприятие. О трениях, возникших между Андреевым и Груздевым, было известно всем, ведь бизнесмен собирался оставить несколько тысяч людей без работы. Сын считает своим долгом отомстить за отца, но загвоздка в том, что Груздев живет в Санкт-Петербурге, его "не достать" – слишком уж высок уровень. Тем не менее Андреев-младший принимает решение идти до конца, чтобы зло вернулось к тем, кто его совершил.

programme.title: Провинциал

programme.title: Nate & Jeremiah by Design
programme.desc: Interior designer Nate Berkus is joined by his husband, fellow designer Jeremiah Brent, as hosts of this home renovation show. Both designers use their undisputed skills to help out homeowners who are stuck in the middle of horrendous home improvement nightmares and who are facing financial ruin because of it. Their aim is to turn the homeowner's money pit into a major asset. Each hour-long episode features a different renovation problem and the two designers use unique design pieces and their own personal touch to add character and value to each project. The series also invites the viewer into the couples' private life to show they cope with raising their daughter, Poppy, "the girl that changed everything.".

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Definitely not created for the squeamish, Dr Pimple Popper features dermatologist and Internet celebrity Dr. Sandra Lee as she treats patients suffering with unique skin conditions such as facial and skin disorders. Including the extraction of blackheads, cysts and uncovering new skin conditions that audiences may not have known of before, Dr. Sandra Lee started uploading content onto Youtube and Instagram, gaining a lot of popularity by people enjoying spots and cysts being popped. Those included within her videos gave written permission for her to record and post the content in exchange for discounted or free-treatments. Dr. Pimple Popper is on a mission to reclaim the lives of those suffering with these unusual and rare skin condition and remove their embarrassment.

programme.title: Dr. Mercy
programme.desc: Get to know Dr. Mercy, the doctor who is changing patients' lives for the better thanks to her deep knowledge and passion. Dr. Mercy takes care of the most bizarre skin cases and makes her patients feel better and healthier not only outside but inside. She tackles giant cysts, rare skin disorders, extreme moles, unwanted female facial hair, acne and what not.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiance: Before the 90 Days
programme.desc: Can you find you husband or wife in the short space of 90 days? What will it actually take for you to marry your person, EVEN before you ever met them? Watch various couple as they head off on the adventures of a lifetime trying to find their significant other as well as attempting to try and establish a personal relationship something they have been talking to online. Follow them on their journey travelling to meet the person they have been talking to. Will this turn out to actually be beneficial or a big waste of time? What will happen next?

programme.title: Nate & Jeremiah by Design
programme.desc: Interior designer Nate Berkus is joined by his husband, fellow designer Jeremiah Brent, as hosts of this home renovation show. Both designers use their undisputed skills to help out homeowners who are stuck in the middle of horrendous home improvement nightmares and who are facing financial ruin because of it. Their aim is to turn the homeowner's money pit into a major asset. Each hour-long episode features a different renovation problem and the two designers use unique design pieces and their own personal touch to add character and value to each project. The series also invites the viewer into the couples' private life to show they cope with raising their daughter, Poppy, "the girl that changed everything.".

programme.title: Unexpected: Teenage & Pregnant
programme.desc: This programme aims to explore the complicated issues that can happen when teenage pregnancy suddenly happens. Focusing on three girls, the camera captures each trimester and the first few weeks of parenthood. Each couple is completely unprepared for what is about to happen when they become parents which is where each set of grandparents comes in handy. Tensions become high as everyone has their own set of rules on what the "perfect" parent should be like and what the future beholds for the young parents to be.

programme.title: Match Me Abroad
programme.desc: After failing to find a soulmate in the US, Americans take the search overseas for a chance at happiness. Expert matchmakers pull out all the stops to connect these hopeful romantics to their one true love.

programme.title: 90 Day: The Single Life
programme.desc: Follow a group of people from the series ''90 Day Fiance'', whose international relationships fell apart, as they embark on a new adventure, and start going on dates in an attempt to find love - again. Some of audience's favourites - Big Ed, Colt, Danielle, Molly, and others, are searching for someone new, and you can join them on their journey.

programme.title: Kitchen Boss
programme.desc: Hosted by Buddy Valastro, this cooking program takes various Italian-American dishes from Valastro's own family recipes and shows how they can be prepared in minimal time and using ingredients that are easily obtainable and affordable. Each meal usually consists of a main course, a side dish and a dessert and Buddy is joined in the kitchen by members of his family to show us how it's done and to add authenticity. Episodes feature Buddy and his wife Lisa making chicken Sorrentino with fusilli with a side of asparagus and chocolate dipped strawberries for dessert for date night; Auntie Anna revealing her secret recipes for manicotti and her chicken with vinegar peppers; or Buddy and his cousin Frankie reminiscing about the sights and food of Italian street fairs. The recipe for each dish can be found on the show's website.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiance: Happily Ever After?
programme.desc: American reality series, a follow-up spinoff of ''90 Day Fiance'' that features couples who have applied for or received a K-1 visa (available uniquely to foreign fiances of U.S. citizens) and have ninety days to marry each other, follows some of the most famous and interesting couples from the original show and documents the ups and downs of their relationships after they got married. For some of these couples, the real drama is just starting because they barely know each other and they have to battle critics, doubters, and various obstacles on their road to love. Some of the couples that are featured on the show are Danielle and Mohamed, Melanie and Devar, Loren and Alexei, Kyle and Noon, Brett and Daya and Russ and Paola.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiance: Happily Ever After?
programme.desc: American reality series, a follow-up spinoff of ''90 Day Fiance'' that features couples who have applied for or received a K-1 visa (available uniquely to foreign fiances of U.S. citizens) and have ninety days to marry each other, follows some of the most famous and interesting couples from the original show and documents the ups and downs of their relationships after they got married. For some of these couples, the real drama is just starting because they barely know each other and they have to battle critics, doubters, and various obstacles on their road to love. Some of the couples that are featured on the show are Danielle and Mohamed, Melanie and Devar, Loren and Alexei, Kyle and Noon, Brett and Daya and Russ and Paola.

programme.title: Polyfamily
programme.desc: Taya confesses that she's interested in a connection with another woman. Sean and Tyler come face-to-face about their son's paternity.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: Carlo's Bakery in Hoboken New Jersey create elaborate, elegant and interesting edible art cakes. Cake Boss follows the team, led by Buddy Valastro, as they design and create two of these masterpieces for all kinds of events and occassions. The show explores the intricacy of working with your family, and their interpersonal relationships with other employees. Watch as they create everything from classic wedding cakes to alien spaceships.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.desc: Amber and Trent Johnston are living the American dream. They have been happily married for 14 years and have five children ranging from 6 to 13 years old. On paper, they might seem like your average family...yet in person, they attract a lot of attention.... because all seven members of the Johnston family – Amber, Trent, their two biological children, Jonah and Elizabeth, as well as their three adopted children, Anna, Emma and Alex – happen to have Achondroplasia Dwarfism. Together, these spunky seven make up the largest known family of Achondroplastic dwarfs in the world, and even describe themselves as "the real life seven dwarfs."

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric Waldrop, their three older boys and sextuplet babies are a tight-knit family living on a sheep farm in small town Alabama. Their strong desire for one more baby resulted in the biggest possible surprise- sextuplets. Have a close look at this adorable family and all of its members starting from the days when there were "just" five of them. Risky pregnancy, premature birth, arriving home, taking care of six babies, managing the whole family and adjusting to the new pace of life- all of this and much more are there for the viewers.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiance: Happily Ever After?
programme.desc: American reality series, a follow-up spinoff of ''90 Day Fiance'' that features couples who have applied for or received a K-1 visa (available uniquely to foreign fiances of U.S. citizens) and have ninety days to marry each other, follows some of the most famous and interesting couples from the original show and documents the ups and downs of their relationships after they got married. programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress With Gok
programme.desc: Fashion guru Gok Wan is at hand to ensure these excited brides look stunning in their dream wedding gowns. Teaming up with Ava Rose Hamilton and her party of consultants, Gok helps these young women choose a dress befitting the occasion, working with each bride individually to create marital masterpieces. Of course, the final decision lies with the bride, and they must say yes to the dress before they can flaunt it down the aisle.

programme.title: The Blended Bunch
programme.desc: What started with tragedy, manifested into a once in a lifetime love story. Before meeting, Erica, a mother of 7, lost her husband to cancer and Spencer, a father of 4, lost his wife in a fatal car crash. Their worlds were completely shattered until they serendipitously met in an online widower support group. Finding love almost immediately, Erica and Spencer exchanged vows and were married after just 13 months. The series centers on their large, newly blended family that will face all kinds of challenges as they merge 11 children under one roof and adjust to a new life in Utah.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: Carlo's Bakery in Hoboken New Jersey create elaborate, elegant and interesting edible art cakes. Cake Boss follows the team, led by Buddy Valastro, as they design and create two of these masterpieces for all kinds of events and occassions. The show explores the intricacy of working with your family, and their interpersonal relationships with other employees. Watch as they create everything from classic wedding cakes to alien spaceships.

programme.title: Sister Wives
programme.desc: Kody Brown, with his four wives Meri, Janelle, Robyn and Christine and their combined 17 children, attempt to navigate life as a "normal" family in a society that shuns their lifestyle. From their unconventional family structure and living arrangements to financial challenges, each half hour episode exposes the inner workings of a polygamist household, revealing the unexpectedly tight-knit and loving relationships between Kody's wives. The series also captures the intense dynamics surrounding a man juggling three wives while attempting to keep it a secret from the outside world- but the general public is not the only challenge that the Brown family unit is facing.

programme.title: Welcome To Plathville
programme.desc: Welcome To Plathville is an American reality series following husband and wife Kim and Barry Plath, and their nine children; Ethan, Hosanna, Micah, Moriah, Lydia, Isaac, Amber, Cassia, and Mercy. Apart from Ethan and Hosanna, who live with their respective spouses, the family reside on a rural farm in Georgia, where the children must abide by Kim and Barry's conservative rules. No sugar, no television, no non-religious music and no video games, the children must follow their parents' strict guidelines, as family life centres around music and God. We follow the family through their daily routines, revealing all the drama that ensues with having so many children.

programme.title: Divided By Design
programme.desc: Ray's best friend wants a luxury overhaul of his spacious backyard. The project is a designer's dream, but escalating costs are a challenge. Also, tensions flare when Eilyn hires her sister to repair a leak at her and Ray's condo.

programme.title: The Blended Bunch
programme.desc: What started with tragedy, manifested into a once in a lifetime love story. Before meeting, Erica, a mother of 7, lost her husband to cancer and Spencer, a father of 4, lost his wife in a fatal car crash. Their worlds were completely shattered until they serendipitously met in an online widower support group. Finding love almost immediately, Erica and Spencer exchanged vows and were married after just 13 months. The series centers on their large, newly blended family that will face all kinds of challenges as they merge 11 children under one roof and adjust to a new life in Utah.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper

Those included within her videos gave written permission for her to record and post the content in exchange for discounted or free-treatments. Dr. Pimple Popper is on a mission to reclaim the lives of those suffering with these unusual and rare skin condition and remove their embarrassment.

programme.title: Nate & Jeremiah by Design
programme.desc: Interior designer Nate Berkus is joined by his husband, fellow designer Jeremiah Brent, as hosts of this home renovation show. Both designers use their undisputed skills to help out homeowners who are stuck in the middle of horrendous home improvement nightmares and who are facing financial ruin because of it. Their aim is to turn the homeowner's money pit into a major asset. Each hour-long episode features a different renovation problem and the two designers use unique design pieces and their own personal touch to add character and value to each project. The series also invites the viewer into the couples' private life to show they cope with raising their daughter, Poppy, "the girl that changed everything.".

programme.title: Sister Wives
programme.desc: Kody Brown, with his four wives Meri, Janelle, Robyn and Christine and their combined 17 children, attempt to navigate life as a "normal" family in a society that shuns their lifestyle. From their unconventional family structure and living arrangements to financial challenges, each half hour episode exposes the inner workings of a polygamist household, revealing the unexpectedly tight-knit and loving relationships between Kody's wives. The series also captures the intense dynamics surrounding a man juggling three wives while attempting to keep it a secret from the outside world- but the general public is not the only challenge that the Brown family unit is facing.

programme.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programme.desc: Severe fungal foot and nail infections, warts, corns, webbed toes, bunions and verrucas are all in a day's work for leading podiatrist Marion Yau and her GP husband Dr Kenny. Together, they tackle extreme and debilitating foot conditions.

programme.title: Inside the Kim Kardashian Heist
programme.desc: Kim Kardashian is robbed of $6 million of jewellery at gunpoint, and for Paris' elite anti-bandit brigade, the reputation of the city is at stake.

With both having inherited a gene pool that boasts a lineage of multiple births, the show will portray how the family celebrates and embraces all of life's hurdles and drama with open arms.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: A commanding English palace is the setting for a royal tale of uncontrollable lust and limitless power, an ornate New York arsenal falls victim to a menacing curse and a advanced machine makes its debut at a Austrian palace.

programme.title: Portals To Hell
programme.desc: Growing up around Ozzy Osbourne must have been, at times, a frightening ordeal for Jack Osbourne, however that hasn't stopped the son of the Prince of Darkness teaming up with paranormal investigator Katrina Weidman, to explore infamous, haunted locations. In each episode of this frightening reality series, Jack and Katrina head to a new place with a chilling history, and each sinister site is said to be a portal to the depths of the underworld. With the help of a team of experts and armed with unique technology, the pair thoroughly examine each new haunting site, hoping to unearth the truth behind their respective mysterious pasts.

programme.title: Ghost Loop
programme.desc: Follow a team of highly specialized paranormal experts, who help both the living and the dead and focus on a distinct type of haunting - ''ghost loop'', which happens when paranormal entities terrorize the living through endless and repetitive supernatural cycles, manifesting again and again in the same location. In each episode, paranormal investigator and medium Sean Austin, empath Kris Star, researcher and tech advisor Chris Califf, design specialist Eric Vitale, and tech support Matt Lytle, examine and research their client's property and history. Then, they formulate a plan they believe will help stop the haunting - whether it's building a 1900s-era train compartment, replicating a tavern from the 1850s, or constructing a 19th century baby's nursery. The team uses emotionally charged settings to draw out the entities in hopes that it will release the energy and break the loop once and for all.

programme.title: Haunted Towns
programme.desc: The TWC team (Tennessee Wraith Chasers) travel across the US to investigate stories of hauntings and horrors, attempting to establish whether there are supernatural forces at play or if they're just folklore. The team is made up of Chris Smith, Steven McDougal, Scott Porter and Brannon Smith. Together they interview witnesses and gather evidence, uncovering the fact behind the fiction to decipher what or who is causing the hauntings. These paranormal places are scattered across America and have long claimed to have spooky pasts; the team hope they can solve the mysteries once and for all. Reality series.

programme.title: The Holzer Files
programme.desc: Based on the real life files of America's first ghost hunter, Dr. Hans Holzer (whose most famous case concerned the Lutz family of Amityville, NY), this show follows a team of paranormal investigators as they reexamine the terrifying tales that mystified the doctor. The team consists of paranormal investigator Dave Schrader, psychic medium Cindy Kaza and equipment technician Shane Pittman and they are aided by Holzer's daughter, Alexandra. They examine thousands of documents, letters, photographs, and audio and visual recordings, sometimes going as far back as the 50s. Following on from where Holzer left off, the team bring the investigations up to the present day and visit the locations of the supernatural events such as the Peck House, the Morris-Jumel Mansion, the Whaley House, and the USS Constellation.

programme.title: The Holzer Files

The team consists of paranormal investigator Dave Schrader, psychic medium Cindy Kaza and equipment technician Shane Pittman and they are aided by Holzer's daughter, Alexandra. They examine thousands of documents, letters, photographs, and audio and visual recordings, sometimes going as far back as the 50s. Following on from where Holzer left off, the team bring the investigations up to the present day and visit the locations of the supernatural events such as the Peck House, the Morris-Jumel Mansion, the Whaley House, and the USS Constellation.

programme.title: Portals To Hell
programme.desc: Growing up around Ozzy Osbourne must have been, at times, a frightening ordeal for Jack Osbourne, however that hasn't stopped the son of the Prince of Darkness teaming up with paranormal investigator Katrina Weidman, to explore infamous, haunted locations. In each episode of this frightening reality series, Jack and Katrina head to a new place with a chilling history, and each sinister site is said to be a portal to the depths of the underworld. With the help of a team of experts and armed with unique technology, the pair thoroughly examine each new haunting site, hoping to unearth the truth behind their respective mysterious pasts.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Paul Beban investigates evil shapeshifters from Navajo folklore known as skinwalkers. Paul tracks the mythical beasts from the heart of Navajo Nation to the infamous Skinwalker Ranch in Utah to Wisconsin, where he captures something unexplainable.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Building Alaska is a reality and documentary TV series following a cast of characters who set out to construct three incredible cabins in the obscure Alaskan wilderness. There are no roads and no building supply centers around, and they have to deal with extreme weather conditions, not to mention curious animals. From the foundation to doors and windows, finishing with interior work and electrical system, everything should be done, so hours and hours of hard work are ahead of the participants.

programme.title: Building Alaska

programme.title: Bizarre Foods with Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: Unmasking an aspect of dining out that will make you think twice before ordering off the menu, and utilizing his knowledge of all things edible, Andrew Zimmern is on a quest to find the world's most bizarre foods. Andrew knows that one man's poison is another's delicacy but he isn't afraid to poke a little fun at the local fare or himself. Our energetic food-a-holic infiltrates markets and restaurants taking viewers behind the scenes to savor the local cuisine - even if that means chewing on eggs with legs, gulping down a beating frog heart or polishing off a lamb's eyeball. Andrew is game for anything and knows the most interesting food is found closest to the source. So whether he's chasing down large water rodents in the Louisiana bayou, fishing for piranha in the Amazon or flushing out cave bats in Malaysia, you can be sure the guy with the iron stomach will dish up the unimaginable.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies
programme.desc: Codes and Conspiracies series uncovers the mind-blowing truth and secret history hidden behind the world's most iconic institutions, secret societies, notorious locations, and mysterious symbols. Find out a dark side of America, presented by shadowy organizations and underground places. There are plenty of spots still remaining secret and puzzles still not done all over the country. The series explores them and presents the uncovered and deciphered of a mysterious real world. Did President Roosevelt know about Pearl Harbor? What are the dirty secrets of slot machines in Las Vegas? What are the blackest secrets of Alcatraz?

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: Documentary series in which host Don Wildman, history enthusiast and adventurer, focuses on interesting and unusual artifacts held in museums, historical institutions, and unexplored archives around the world. Don discovers extraordinary, obscure relics and artifacts, shares their incredible stories, that have either been forgotten or are lesser known, and reveals their secrets, taking the viewers on a spectacular tour through history. We also get to find out why and how some of these unusual objects ended up in the museums.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum

Don discovers extraordinary, obscure relics and artifacts, shares their incredible stories, that have either been forgotten or are lesser known, and reveals their secrets, taking the viewers on a spectacular tour through history. programme.title: Mummies Unwrapped
programme.desc: Mummies Unwrapped follows passionate Egyptologist, Ramy Romany, as he investigates tombs, graves and burial sites, shedding a light on these mummified individuals. Famous for his love of Egyptian history, Ramy Romany has featured in over 100 documentaries on the ancient civilisation, and in this series uncovers myths, legends and stories about each mummy, whilst attempting to identify their history and origin. This fascinating documentary unearths new theories and evidence that could rewrite history forever.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: Alaska is a hotbed for UFO sightings, abductions and extraterrestrial encounters. Why are these otherworldly visitors drawn to America's last frontier? Shocking new evidence and personal testimony from local witnesses shed light on the alien activity.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: Alaska is a hotbed for UFO sightings, abductions and extraterrestrial encounters. Why are these otherworldly visitors drawn to America's last frontier? Shocking new evidence and personal testimony from local witnesses shed light on the alien activity.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters
programme.desc: Mountain Monsters is an American cryptozoology-themed reality TV series revolving around the Appalachian Investigators of Mysterious Sightings team. It is a group of six skilled native West Virginian hunters and trappers. They are on a mission to study and track unidentified creatures in the Appalachian Mountains. Their main goal is to prove that mysterious creatures like Bigfoot, Werewolf, Hellhound, Lizard Man, and Mothman do exist and provide the proper evidence to the viewers.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: Experts and eyewitnesses attempt to unlock the mystery of the Alaska Triangle, a remote area infamous for alien abductions, Bigfoot sightings, paranormal phenomena and vanishing airplanes. Throughout the series, we meet a woman whose idyllic Alaskan dream soon descends into a paranormal nightmare, as she starts to suffer attacks by an unseen force. Recent sightings may prove that a Native American legend about a mysterious race of giants is true. The series also explores The Missing Douglas and whether an interdimensional portal in the Alaska Triangle led to the disappearance of the airplane carrying 44 military personnel in 1950.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: This paranormal reality series follows explorer and ghost hunter Dakota Laden who partners up his sister Chelsea and best friend Tanner, to travel across the country in an RV and visit the most haunted locations in America -dark corridors of Brushy Mountain State Penitentiary, notorious Eloise Psychiatric Hospital, terrifying St. Albans Sanatorium and many more, as they learn the blood-chilling stories behind this scary places and face their darkest fears.

programme.title: Paranormal Emergency
programme.desc: Supernatural documentary series that features police officers, paramedics and other first responders who share their stories of interactions with mysterious entities while on duty. The viewers will have a chance to find out what happens when events they encounter on their jobs don't seem to coincide with the laws of the natural world. Each episode investigates various cases involving ghostly hauntings, demonic possessions, alien encounters and other ''bizarre'' emergency calls told through the eyes of the first responders.

programme.title: Ghost Stalkers
programme.desc: In the premiere episode, "Whispers Estate" on Sunday, October 19 at 10/9c, reports of violent hauntings, goat-like demons, and bizarre shadow creatures drive John and Chad to investigate a possible ghost portal at the Whispers Estate in Mitchell, Indiana. The estate was once home to Dr. John Gibbons, who went insane after his daughter died in a second-floor fire. Over the course of two nights, John and Chad explore whether the spectral attacks are the work of Dr. Gibbons and his family or of something far more evil. The Closer they get to the truth, the more they find themselves in the house's crosshairs.

programme.title: Ghost Stalkers
programme.desc: Investigators of the strange, John E.L. Tenney and Chad Lindberg, explore the world's most allegedly haunted locations in search of the truth regarding the nature of existence and if there are worlds beyond our reality.

programme.title: Ghost Loop
programme.desc: Follow a team of highly specialized paranormal experts, who help both the living and the dead and focus on a distinct type of haunting - ''ghost loop'', which happens when paranormal entities terrorize the living through endless and repetitive supernatural cycles, manifesting again and again in the same location. In each episode, paranormal investigator and medium Sean Austin, empath Kris Star, researcher and tech advisor Chris Califf, design specialist Eric Vitale, and tech support Matt Lytle, examine and research their client's property and history. Then, they formulate a plan they believe will help stop the haunting - whether it's building a 1900s-era train compartment, replicating a tavern from the 1850s, or constructing a 19th century baby's nursery. The team uses emotionally charged settings to draw out the entities in hopes that it will release the energy and break the loop once and for all.

programme.title: Haunted Towns
programme.desc: The TWC team (Tennessee Wraith Chasers) travel across the US to investigate stories of hauntings and horrors, attempting to establish whether there are supernatural forces at play or if they're just folklore. The team is made up of Chris Smith, Steven McDougal, Scott Porter and Brannon Smith. Together they interview witnesses and gather evidence, uncovering the fact behind the fiction to decipher what or who is causing the hauntings. These paranormal places are scattered across America and have long claimed to have spooky pasts; the team hope they can solve the mysteries once and for all. Reality series.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: ICE COLD GOLD spotlights a spirited team of miners who are among the first Americans to prospect for precious metals and gems in parts of Greenland where humans never have set foot before. The six-part series follows eight men who leave behind their families, friends and homeland to strike it rich against all odds while struggling to survive against the harshest of conditions. Greenland's a veritable beast, but the motley crew of ICE COLD GOLD miners is up for the challenge. Each thinks he has what it takes to walk away with gold, rubies and sapphires before winter and large mining companies swoop in. What transpires as the miners cope with the unpredictable, harsh unknown? Are they humbled by their journey? Do their personalities get in the way? Most importantly, do they strike ICE COLD GOLD?ed ice sheets.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: From small towns in the South to remote areas of the Pacific Northwest and Alaska, four eccentric but passionate members of the Bigfoot Field Researchers Organization (BFRO) embark on one single-minded mission: to find the elusive "creature" known as Bigfoot or the Sasquatch. The team consists of Bigfoot Field Researchers Organization (BFRO) founder and President Matt Moneymaker, researchers James "Bobo" Fay and Cliff Barackman and skeptical scientist Ranae Holland. The series never questions the existence of Bigfoot, but rather documents the team's search efforts and study of evidence in an attempt to prove the existence of the elusive creature.

programme.title: Beyond The Unknown
programme.desc: Don Wildman explores extraordinary stories in this riveting documentary series, delving into myths, legends, and local tales to reveal the truth behind a number of perplexing tales. His adventures take him all across the American landscape as he attempts to get to the bottom of some of history's most intriguing stories, examining astonishing and implausible events. Each episode focusses on a variety of inextricable events, using interviews, archive footage, and dramatised re-enactments to portray the implausible. Let Don take you Beyond the Unknown; a world of bizarre occurrences, peculiarities, sinister evils, and unsolved happenings.

programme.title: Ghost Brothers
programme.desc: What you see is what you get with Dalen Spratt, Juwan Mass and Marcus Harvey, the Southeast's newest and most dynamic paranormal investigation team. These three best friends lead Destination America's new series GHOST BROTHERS, on a mission to uncover whether some unique, legendary "haunted" houses are the real deal. Raised in religious households, Dalen, Juwan and Marcus were taught that "messing" with the dead is dangerous business, but some unexplained experiences of their own piqued their intense fascination, ultimately driving them to find out firsthand just how spooky the supernatural can be. Blending natural curiosity with comedic flair, these charismatic characters offer a fresh, funny and unique take on the spirit world.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: A foreboding Transylvanian castle provides the chilling inspiration for an infamous literary villain; a stunning French chateau incites a bitter rivalry between two powerful women; and a mythical monarch steps-into the real world at a breathtaking English Abbey.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: A commanding English palace is the setting for a royal tale of uncontrollable lust and limitless power, an ornate New York arsenal falls victim to a menacing curse and a advanced machine makes its debut at a Austrian palace.

programme.title: Bucket List
programme.desc: Bucket List is a travel program entirely dedicated to Japan, a wonderful country with unique culture and traditions, volcanoes, cuisine, lifestyle, and amazing people. Paddy Doherty and Daniel Coll are active in the British and Irish media, visit Japan and experience various things in each region, while encountering challenges that make them confront their own phobias and fears. The viewers who are not yet familiar with Japan will put it on their bucket list and eventually come to visit and see the one-of-a-kind localities themselves.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: For many years passion for travelling has been bringing people to unexplored continents, countries and places to look into culture, history, food, nature and people. This kind of passion if the key point of Backpack, a travel show that opens new spots all over the world by a show host travelling solo with a backpack. So make yourself comfortable and enjoy visiting Serbia, Spain, Israel, India, Egypt and many more. Take a look at the historical past and modern life, find out about traditions, get to know tourism hotspots and treasures of nature, plan your future vacations with the help of show hosts' recommendations.

programme.title: Xplore Cambodia
programme.desc: Xplore Cambodia on Travelxp opens an exotic country for the viewers. Watch the show and experience its glory of nature and historical past, learn the traditional Apsara Dance, find out what the local Cambodian food is like. Relax at its fantastic beaches with white sands and turquoise waters. Visit the legendary ruins of Angkor, a powerful symbol of Cambodia. Together with the host discover Cambodian modern history and traditions.

programme.title: Off the Grid
programme.desc: This exciting series takes you to some of the most unusual places all around the world. Join the presenters as they visit remote destinations that are not the typical choices for tourists. Off the Grid shows you the hidden and often overlooked places with all their treasures. Discover them through their culture, history and way of living. Explore the food, traditions and customs and meet the people of wonderful countries like Gabon, India, Ethiopia, Ireland and more.

programme.title: Best from the Rest
programme.desc: In our fast-moving world even on a holiday we are always short of time and in a rush. Best From the Rest on TravelXP will filter the information to save you every single minute so that you won't miss a thing. The show highlights top five places or activities that deserve your full attention in various cities all over the world. From top 5 romantic places in Mauritius, 5 best things to do when in Dubai, to 5 must see destinations in Hong Kong, 5 most sacred temples in the state of Rajasthan and 5 new adventures in Jordan. Every signature episode will take your breath away.

programme.title: Landmarks
programme.desc: Landmarks is a documentary series that celebrates wonderful sites from all around the world that have great cultural and historical significance. From natural beauties to monuments raised in remembrance of important historical figures, from architectural wonders to religious sites, these are some of the world's most amazing landmarks. Discover the stories behind them and find out more about their importance, both in the past and in the present day, including sites like the Buckingham Palace, the Dead Sea and the Burj Khalifa skyscraper in Dubai.

programme.desc: In our fast-moving world even on a holiday we are always short of time and in a rush. Best From the Rest on TravelXP will filter the information to save you every single minute so that you won't miss a thing. The show highlights top five places or activities that deserve your full attention in various cities all over the world. From top 5 romantic places in Mauritius, 5 best things to do when in Dubai, to 5 must see destinations in Hong Kong, 5 most sacred temples in the state of Rajasthan and 5 new adventures in Jordan. Every signature episode will take your breath away.

programme.title: Landmarks
programme.desc: Landmarks is a documentary series that celebrates wonderful sites from all around the world that have great cultural and historical significance. From natural beauties to monuments raised in remembrance of important historical figures, from architectural wonders to religious sites, these are some of the world's most amazing landmarks. Discover the stories behind them and find out more about their importance, both in the past and in the present day, including sites like the Buckingham Palace, the Dead Sea and the Burj Khalifa skyscraper in Dubai.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: For many years passion for travelling has been bringing people to unexplored continents, countries and places to look into culture, history, food, nature and people. This kind of passion if the key point of Backpack, a travel show that opens new spots all over the world by a show host travelling solo with a backpack. So make yourself comfortable and enjoy visiting Serbia, Spain, Israel, India, Egypt and many more. Take a look at the historical past and modern life, find out about traditions, get to know tourism hotspots and treasures of nature, plan your future vacations with the help of show hosts' recommendations.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: City Breaks is a travel show that guides you through most astonishing cities of the world to show their rich history and culture and inspires you to explore everything a city has to offer on a city break, its cuisine, shopping spots, wonderful views, historical values. From picturesque old towns to modern young cities, City breaks has it all- Munich, Budapest, Samarkand, Madrid, Dubai and much more. Take a rest and take a city break, you won't regret a single second.

programme.title: Xplore Cambodia
programme.desc: Xplore Cambodia on Travelxp opens an exotic country for the viewers. Watch the show and experience its glory of nature and historical past, learn the traditional Apsara Dance, find out what the local Cambodian food is like. Relax at its fantastic beaches with white sands and turquoise waters. Visit the legendary ruins of Angkor, a powerful symbol of Cambodia. Together with the host discover Cambodian modern history and traditions.

programme.title: Off the Grid
programme.desc: This exciting series takes you to some of the most unusual places all around the world. Join the presenters as they visit remote destinations that are not the typical choices for tourists. Off the Grid shows you the hidden and often overlooked places with all their treasures. Discover them through their culture, history and way of living. Explore the food, traditions and customs and meet the people of wonderful countries like Gabon, India, Ethiopia, Ireland and more.

programme.title: Bucket List
programme.desc: Bucket List is a travel program entirely dedicated to Japan, a wonderful country with unique culture and traditions, volcanoes, cuisine, lifestyle, and amazing people. Paddy Doherty and Daniel Coll are active in the British and Irish media, visit Japan and experience various things in each region, while encountering challenges that make them confront their own phobias and fears. The viewers who are not yet familiar with Japan will put it on their bucket list and eventually come to visit and see the one-of-a-kind localities themselves.

programme.title: Вскрытие покажет
programme.desc: Судмедэксперт Инга Вилкас — настоящая супер-профи от ее внимательного взгляда не скроется ни одно доказательство. Раскрывать преступления ей приходится вместе со следователем Олегом Гончаром. На первый взгляд их дуэт слишком противоречив: девушка то и дело направляет свои шипы на коллегу, а он их жестко отвергает. Но, в работе эта парочка отлично дополняет друг друга.

programme.title: Вскрытие покажет
programme.desc: Судмедэксперт Инга Вилкас — настоящая супер-профи от ее внимательного взгляда не скроется ни одно доказательство. programme.title: Мистические истории
programme.desc: Каждая серия состоит из двух историй. Все они основаны на реальных событияхпересказанные так, как услышаны от реальных участников описываемых событий либо от экстрасенсов, работавших с участниками. В проекте задействованы различные специалисты, которые анализируют происходящие в кадре события, и высказывают свое мнение. Здесь и психологи, и экстрасенсы, и биоэнергетики, и врачи, и даже ведьмы. Каждый из них имеет свое собственное видение происходящего - они лишь озвучивают свои мнения. Вывод о том, кто прав, и действительно ли в основе рассказанных историй лежит мистика, или же результат самовнушения, — делает сам зритель.

programme.title: Документальный фильм
programme.desc: Вашему вниманию предлагаются к просмотру документальные фильмы.

programme.title: Владимирская,
programme.desc: В Подольском райотделе полиции Киева создается оперативная группа, задача которой - расследовать по горячим следам сложные, запутанные и загадочные преступления…

programme.title: Мистические истории
programme.desc: Каждая серия состоит из двух историй. programme.title: Позднее раскаяние
programme.desc: В основу сериала "Позднее раскаяние" легла история двух семей. Семья Милы и Кости держится исключительно благодаря двум дочерям, Лике и Кире. Мила давно сняла со счетов мужа, который не может обеспечить семью, отдав предпочтение предприимчивому любовнику Томашу. А вот жизнь семьи Анны и ее сына Сергея подчинена ожиданию чуда – не смотря на то, что ее муж уже несколько лет числится пропавшим без вести, Анна все еще верит, что он вернется из Афганистана. И так непростая жизнь двух семей внезапно запутывается еще больше, когда оказывается, что у подростков Киры и Сергея будет ребенок, а ведь влюбленным всего по 16 лет.

programme.title: Женский доктор
programme.desc: Действие разворачивается в новой современной клинике, которую основал профессор Юрий Климов. Бывшему тестю доктора Романа Широкова остался лишь год до выхода на пенсию, и за это время он должен найти достойного преемника. Но это не главная причина, по которой профессор вновь приглашает Романа работать вместе. Роман Широков - единственный, кто может довести до конца инновационную научную разработку, от которой зависит судьба дочери профессора - Нины. Однако инвесторы и сотрудники клиники не рады появлению нового профессионала.

programme.title: Женский доктор
programme.desc: Действие разворачивается в новой современной клинике, которую основал профессор Юрий Климов. programme.title: Аметистовая сережка
programme.desc: Это история любви, предательства и мести. Акушер-гинеколог Евгения и финансовый аналитик Виктор жили счастливо и хорошо, пока Виктор не начал изменять с красавицей Анной. В один прекрасный момент он узнает, что от него беременны и жена, и любовница Анна. Виктор делает сложный выбор в пользу Евгении и окончательно возвращается в семью. Анна все равно решила оставить ребенка. Но случается трагедия – малыш погибает. Чтобы забыть этот кошмар, девушка уезжает на родину. Спустя время, сохранить мир в семье героям не удается. Пара живет вместе только ради любимого сына Костика. И тут Евгения находит дома чужую аметистовую сережку…

programme.title: Женский доктор
programme.desc: Действие разворачивается в новой современной клинике, которую основал профессор Юрий Климов. Бывшему тестю доктора Романа Широкова остался лишь год до выхода на пенсию, и за это время он должен найти достойного преемника. Но это не главная причина, по которой профессор вновь приглашает Романа работать вместе. Роман Широков - единственный, кто может довести до конца инновационную научную разработку, от которой зависит судьба дочери профессора - Нины. Однако инвесторы и сотрудники клиники не рады появлению нового профессионала.

programme.title: Вскрытие покажет
programme.desc: Судмедэксперт Инга Вилкас — настоящая супер-профи от ее внимательного взгляда не скроется ни одно доказательство. Раскрывать преступления ей приходится вместе со следователем Олегом Гончаром. На первый взгляд их дуэт слишком противоречив: девушка то и дело направляет свои шипы на коллегу, а он их жестко отвергает. Но, в работе эта парочка отлично дополняет друг друга.

programme.title: Вскрытие покажет
programme.desc: Судмедэксперт Инга Вилкас — настоящая супер-профи от ее внимательного взгляда не скроется ни одно доказательство. programme.title: Позднее раскаяние
programme.desc: В основу сериала "Позднее раскаяние" легла история двух семей. Семья Милы и Кости держится исключительно благодаря двум дочерям, Лике и Кире. Мила давно сняла со счетов мужа, который не может обеспечить семью, отдав предпочтение предприимчивому любовнику Томашу. А вот жизнь семьи Анны и ее сына Сергея подчинена ожиданию чуда – не смотря на то, что ее муж уже несколько лет числится пропавшим без вести, Анна все еще верит, что он вернется из Афганистана. И так непростая жизнь двух семей внезапно запутывается еще больше, когда оказывается, что у подростков Киры и Сергея будет ребенок, а ведь влюбленным всего по 16 лет.

programme.title: Гречанка
programme.desc: Главная героиня - Таня Куликова работает экскурсоводом в небольшом провинциальном музее. Она серьезно интересуется искусством, а главный ее "конёк" – искусство Древней Греции. Таня и внешне похожа на гречанку – кареглазая, смуглая, с копной вьющихся волос. Именно благодаря своему увлечению, девушка знакомится с предприимчивым арт-дилером из Москвы – Григорием Середой. Он красив, богат, умен – настоящий принц. Казалось бы, главная героиня вытащила тот самый счастливый билет. Но только Таня и не догадывается, что, выйдя замуж за Гришу, ей придется иметь дело с его властной матерью, бесхребетной сестрой и интриганкой-любовницей. Сказка для Тани быстро сменится суровыми буднями. Но сможет ли девушка пройти нелегкий, полный предательства, разочарований и страданий путь? Найдет ли она дорогу к своему счастью?

programme.title: Документальный фильм
programme.desc: Вашему вниманию предлагаются к просмотру документальные фильмы.

programme.title: Гречанка

programme.title: Владимирская,
programme.desc: В Подольском райотделе полиции Киева создается оперативная группа, задача которой - расследовать по горячим следам сложные, запутанные и загадочные преступления…

programme.title: Мистические истории
programme.desc: Каждая серия состоит из двух историй. Все они основаны на реальных событияхпересказанные так, как услышаны от реальных участников описываемых событий либо от экстрасенсов, работавших с участниками. В проекте задействованы различные специалисты, которые анализируют происходящие в кадре события, и высказывают свое мнение. Здесь и психологи, и экстрасенсы, и биоэнергетики, и врачи, и даже ведьмы. Каждый из них имеет свое собственное видение происходящего - они лишь озвучивают свои мнения. Вывод о том, кто прав, и действительно ли в основе рассказанных историй лежит мистика, или же результат самовнушения, — делает сам зритель.

programme.title: Uz līnijas
programme.desc: Diskusiju raidījumā "Uz līnijas" iepazīsim aktuālas un interesantas Latvijas personības. Uzdod savu jautājumu tiešraidē pa studijas tālruni 67630301!

programme.title: Par karu Ukrainā ar Igoru Rajevu
Globuss
programme.desc: Raidījums "Globuss" reizi nedēļā skaidro ārpolitikas un starptautiskās aktualitātes, no kurām izriet arī Latvijas politiskā, ekonomiskā, tautsaimniecības un kultūras pozīcija un pārmaiņas.

programme.title: Preses klubs
programme.desc: Diskusiju raidījums, kurā raidījuma vadītājs ar trim viesiem apspriež konkrētās dienas aktualitātes.

programme.title: Radio Svoboda
programme.desc: Mumins Šakirovs ir pieredzējis žurnālists un dokumentālo filmu veidotājs, kurš strādājis daudzos nozīmīgos pasākumos un karstajos punktos. Kopā ar ekspertiem viņš katru sestdienu sadala svarīgākās Krievijas un pasaules ziņas. Politika un ekonomika, kultūra un zinātne. Cenšoties saviem skatītājiem sniegt pilnvērtīgu un skaidru priekšstatu par notikumiem, nodalot svarīgus notikumus no informatīvā trokšņa.

programme.title: Globuss
programme.desc: Raidījums "Globuss" reizi nedēļā skaidro ārpolitikas un starptautiskās aktualitātes, no kurām izriet arī Latvijas politiskā, ekonomiskā, tautsaimniecības un kultūras pozīcija un pārmaiņas.

programme.title: Nedēļa P.S.
programme.desc: NEDĒĻA. POST SCRIPTUM IR RAIDĪJUMS PAR NEDĒĻAS AKTUĀLĀKO PROBLĒMU VIEDOKĻU KRUSTUGUNĪS: MEKLĒSIM CĒLOŅUS, ANALIZĒSIM SEKAS UN BŪVĒSIM RISINĀJUMUS SABIEDRĪBAS LABKLĀJĪBAI.

programme.desc: Raidījumā tiks apskatītas dažādas tēmas un noskaidrotas atbildes uz neskaidriem sadzīves jautājumiem, piemēram, juridiskas dabas vai par sociāliem pakalpojumiem.
